name: penneylaw-static
description: Frank Penney Injury Law static website

scripts.minify:js: uglifyjs js/trusted-types.js js/main.js js/component-loader.js js/form-validation.js js/consent.js -o js/bundle.min.js -c -m
scripts.test:redirects: node scripts/test-redirects.js "../Frank Penney - Migration - 2026 - Pages.csv" http://localhost:8888
scripts.build: npm run lint:redirects && npm run minify:css && npm run minify:blog-css && npm run minify:js && npm run minify:blog-js && npm run minify:accident-news-js && npm run minify:city-js && npm run minify:consent-js && npm run minify:ad-tracking-js && npm run build:lps && npm run generate:sitemap
